debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
⊢ inner ℂ x (a y) =
    (toComplexMeasure (@toResolutionOfIdentity H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha) x y).integral
      ⇑(Function.Embedding.subtype (spectrum ℂ a))

failed_attempts:
have hμ : toComplexMeasure (toResolutionOfIdentity ha) x y = cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y := by
    ext s hs
    rw [ResolutionOfIdentity.toComplexMeasure_apply]
    simp [toResolutionOfIdentity, toBoundedBilin, InnerProductSpace.continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply,
      ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator _ hs]
  rw [hμ, ComplexRMK.integral_rieszMeasure, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  congr 2
  exact ContinuousFunctionalCalculus.cfcHom_id ha.isStarNormal

have hμ : toComplexMeasure (toResolutionOfIdentity ha) x y = cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y := by
    ext s hs
    simp [toResolutionOfIdentity, toBoundedBilin, toComplexMeasure_apply,
      continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply, hs]
  rw [hμ, cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral continuous_subtype_val]
  simp only [cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  congr
  exact ContinuousFunctionalCalculus.map_id a

let f : C(spectrum ℂ a, ℂ) := ⟨Function.Embedding.subtype _, continuous_subtype_val⟩
  have : toComplexMeasure (toResolutionOfIdentity ha) x y = cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y := by

    simp [toComplexMeasure_apply, toResolutionOfIdentity, toBoundedBilin,

  rw [this]
  trans cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f
  · simp [cfcHom_id]
  · symm
    exact ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral_apply _ f

  have hι : cfcHom ha.isStarNormal ι = a := cfcHom_id ha.isStarNormal

let f : C(spectrum ℂ a, ℂ) := ⟨Function.Embedding.subtype (spectrum ℂ a), continuous_subtype_val⟩
  have h_meas : toComplexMeasure (toResolutionOfIdentity ha) x y = cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y := by
    ext s hs
    simp only [toComplexMeasure_apply, toResolutionOfIdentity,
      InnerProductSpace.continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply, toBoundedBilin]
    exact ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) hs
  rw [h_meas, ← cfcHom_id ha.isStarNormal, ← cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply ha f x y]
  exact (ComplexRMK.integral_rieszMeasure _ f).symm

let f : C(spectrum ℂ a, ℂ) := ⟨Function.Embedding.subtype (spectrum ℂ a), continuous_subtype_val⟩
  have h_meas : (toComplexMeasure (toResolutionOfIdentity ha) x y) = cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y := by
    apply ComplexMeasure.ext
    intro s hs
    simp only [toResolutionOfIdentity, continuousLinearMapOfBilin, toBoundedBilin, toComplexMeasure,
      ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator hs]
  rw [h_meas]
  have h_riesz : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f = cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f :=
    ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral_apply _ _
  rw [h_riesz, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  congr 2
  exact (ContinuousFunctionalCalculus.cfcHom_id ha.isStarNormal f).symm

    simp only [continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply, toBoundedBilin]
    rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator hs (1 : ℂ)]

  rw [h_meas, ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral_apply id_f]
  simp only [cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  congr 1
  exact cfcHom_id ha.isStarNormal
